metadata.title: Next Shadcn
metadata.description: Basic dashboard with Next.js and Shadcn
metadata.dashboardDescription: Basic dashboard with Next.js and Shadcn

sidebar.signInPrompt: Sign in to manage your account

infoSidebar.gettingStartedDescription: Learn how to get started with this application.

exec.revenueLabel: Revenue {revenue} K ₴ · Accrued cashback {accrued} K ₴ · Paid out {paid} K ₴ ({paidPct}%)
exec.roiCardTitle: Revenue vs Cashback Costs · by month
exec.roiCardDescription: K ₴ · Purple = bank revenue · Light = accrued cashback · Neutral = paid cashback
exec.roiFormula: ROI = Revenue / Accrued Cashback × 100. Conservative estimate — accounts for all obligations.
exec.activeClientsDescription: Selected and used cashback in a month
exec.turnoverDescription: With cashback vs without program · K ₴ / month
exec.turnoverFooter: Turnover with cashback +177% over 6 months · Total February:
exec.revenueStructureDescription: K ₴ · <wc>■</wc> With cashback <wo>■</wo> Without program · Hover = details

cashbackImpact.title: Cashback Impact
cashbackImpact.description: Cashback program effectiveness analysis by category
cashbackImpact.lowConversionDescription: Categories with conversion <5% need offer or communication review.
cashbackImpact.block1Description: ROI analysis by category: bar chart, turnover/cashback scatter, top-5 dynamics
cashbackImpact.roiByCategoriesDescription: Sorted by ROI from highest to lowest. Zones: red <50x, yellow 50–200x, green >200x
cashbackImpact.turnoverVsCashbackDescription: Each category = bubble. Size = number of transactions. Anomalous categories highlighted in tooltip
cashbackImpact.block2Description: Conversion funnel and "Conversion vs Average Check" heatmap
cashbackImpact.heatmapDescription: Rows = categories, columns = check ranges. Color = conversion %. Transport and Supermarkets show highest conversion at low check — cheapest loyalty.
cashbackImpact.block3Description: Before/after, cohort activated vs control group, cannibalization analysis
cashbackImpact.beforeAfterTitle: Turnover and Transactions: Before vs After Offer Launch
cashbackImpact.beforeAfterDescription: 3 months before vs 3 months after for top 8 categories
cashbackImpact.cohortDescription: Average turnover per client (₴/month) over 6 months
cashbackImpact.cannibalizationDescription: Total client spending before and after cashback activation
cashbackImpact.cannibalizationFooter: Total spending increased — not just redistribution between categories. Cashback categories +112%, other −12% over period.

cashback.title: Offer Details
cashback.allNormal: All categories are within target or above
cashback.categoriesNeedAttention: {count, plural, one {# category needs} other {# categories need}} immediate attention
cashback.categoriesListLabel: All categories & offers · deviation from target
cashback.funnelDescription: Funnel: Shown → Selected → Transaction → Cashback · Red dropout > 25%
cashback.droppingTrend: Dropping {value}pp per month — negative trend. A/B test recommended.
cashback.detailsTableDescription: Sorted by deviation from target · Click row to see funnel · Red = below benchmark

communications.title: Communications
communications.description: Upload reports, analyze conversion, and compare campaigns
communications.channelEffectivenessDescription: Aggregate across all uploads · sorted by revenue lift
communications.revenueLiftNote: * Revenue lift — comparison of average monthly turnover of those who received the message with clients without any communications and cashback
communications.uploadFirstCsv: Upload the first CSV file to get started
communications.selectOneMore: Select one more upload to compare
communications.alreadyInList: This upload is already in the list
communications.uploadDescription: Select product and target action, then upload CSV
communications.csvStructureDescription: First row — headers, encoding UTF-8, delimiter — comma
communications.csvHelpText: One row = one client. {customerId} — unique client identifier; {campaignId} — unique marketing campaign identifier (required). {sent} — send date (required); {delivered}, {opened}, {clicked} — event dates (empty if not occurred). Channel values: {email}, {sms}, {push}, {viber} or {other}.

dictionaries.title: Target Actions & Sources Dictionaries
dictionaries.description: Catalog of products for analytics with information source, activity/inactivity conditions, and list of target actions. Data sources dictionary is reused for products and communications.
dictionaries.productDictionaryDescription: Select a product to view source, conditions, and target actions
dictionaries.productTargetActionsDescription: Fields: ID, name, description, identification method (v2), source (v2, optional)
dictionaries.dataSourcesDescription: Centralized source catalog for product analytics and communications
dictionaries.productInfoDescription: Product information source and activity conditions

reports.title: Quick Cashback Withdrawal + Refund
reports.description: Clients with suspicious scenario: maximum cashback in a single transaction, withdrawal in 10-40 minutes, and subsequent product return.
reports.clientListDescription: Sorted by event date: newest first

abTests.title: A/B Tests
abTests.description: Comparison of test and control groups for cashback offers
abTests.detailedComparisonDescription: Personal cashback Café 5% vs 7% — group metrics comparison
abTests.detailedComparisonFooter: Confidence 87% — test ongoing. Expected result date: 02/28/2025

metricDrawer.footer: For comparison with the previous period, the same calculation methodology and the same client base are used.

notFound.title: Something's missing
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Learn more about this project
about.openSourceDescription: This is an open-source Next.js admin dashboard starter built with modern web technologies. It provides a solid foundation for building powerful admin interfaces and dashboards. The source code is freely available for developers to use, modify, and distribute.
about.demoPurposeDescription: This application serves as a demo for demonstration purposes. It showcases the features, components, and capabilities of the admin dashboard starter. Feel free to explore the interface, test the functionality, and evaluate if it meets your project requirements.
about.dataPrivacyDescription: We take your privacy seriously. No personal data is misused, shared, or sold to third parties. Any information collected during your use of this demo application is used solely for the purpose of providing the demonstration experience and is handled in accordance with best practices for data protection.
about.footer: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introductionText: Welcome to our application. These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of our platform. By accessing or using this application, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully before proceeding to use our services.
terms.demoPurposeText: This application is provided solely for demonstration and educational purposes. It is not intended for production use, and we make no guarantees regarding its suitability for any specific purpose. All data and functionality are provided as-is for showcasing features and capabilities only.
terms.openSourceText: This is an open-source project. The source code is available for review, modification, and distribution under the applicable open-source license. We encourage community contributions and feedback to help improve the project. Please refer to the project repository for licensing details and contribution guidelines.
terms.noWarrantyText: This application is provided "as is" without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We expressly disclaim all warranties, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not warrant that the application will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.
terms.dataUsageText: Any data you provide while using this demo application may be stored temporarily for the purpose of demonstrating functionality. We do not guarantee the security or privacy of any data entered into this demo application. Please do not enter sensitive, personal, or confidential information. Data may be deleted or reset at any time without notice.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms of Service at any time at our sole discretion. It is your responsibility to review these terms periodically for changes. Your continued use of the application following the posting of any changes constitutes acceptance of those changes.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please refer to the project documentation or repository for more information.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introductionText: This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your personal information when you use our application. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring transparency about our data practices. Please read this policy carefully to understand how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
privacy.dataCollectionText: Our application collects minimal data necessary for its operation. Information is used solely to provide the functionality of this application and is never misused or shared with third parties.
privacy.noDataMisuseText: We take your privacy seriously. We want to assure you that your personal data is never sold, rented, or shared with third parties for marketing or commercial purposes. Your information is used exclusively for the intended functionality of this application and is never misused or exploited in any way.
privacy.demoApplicationText: Please note that this is a demo application created for demonstration and educational purposes. It showcases various features and technologies but should not be considered a production-ready service. Any data you provide may be temporary and could be removed at any time as part of regular maintenance.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please feel free to contact us at
